meta.project: ILM — Interactive Learning Material (V1, workflow v2)
meta.pipeline_step: LOGGING (run trace, eval scores, reviewer edits) + OBSERVABILITY
meta.runs_in: code checks run per pipeline run
meta.note: Logs feed the self-evolving loop, so log gaps silently starve it. PRD non-negotiable #4: logging on every run.

cases.edge_case: Run trace exists but one skill's eval scores are missing (skill errored and the except block skipped logging)
cases.failure_mode: skill_3 invoked, no score logged. Failure paths are exactly the runs the self-evolving loop needs most — error handlers must log a failure record, not skip the write.
cases.judge_instructions: Code grader: assert eval_scores keys == skills_invoked; flag any invoked skill without a score or explicit error record.

cases.edge_case: Log stores only the post-edit final text, not what changed
cases.failure_mode: Without pre-edit text or a diff, reviewer corrections can't become memory entries or eval cases — the 'corrections' edge in the diagram has nothing to carry. Edited actions must store both versions.
cases.judge_instructions: Code grader: when action == 'edited', flag if pre_edit_text or diff is null.

cases.edge_case: Retry of a failed concept reuses the parent run_id, overwriting the failed attempt's trace
cases.failure_mode: Auto-retry (Eval gate 2's fail->regenerate edge) erases its own failure evidence — the optimizer then never sees what failed. Attempts need distinct IDs (r_0042.1, r_0042.2) and immutable writes.
cases.judge_instructions: Code grader: flag duplicate (run_id, attempt) keys or any overwrite of an existing trace record.

cases.edge_case: Raw request payload logged for debuggability includes the Authorization header
cases.failure_mode: Traces flow to observability dashboards and (per the PRD) start life in a spreadsheet — the widest-shared, least-protected store in the project. Redact key patterns at write time.
cases.judge_instructions: Code grader: scan trace blobs for credential patterns (Bearer, sk-, api_key=); flag any hit. Redaction must happen before persistence, not at display time.

cases.edge_case: Complete, immutable, redacted trace with edit diff
cases.judge_instructions: All completeness, uniqueness, and redaction invariants hold.
